page.title: Comprehensive services for power plants
page.subtitle: We support your plant throughout the entire turbine lifecycle: from initial assembly to major maintenance, modernization and ongoing technical support.
page.ctaTitle: Don't see the service you need?
page.ctaSubtitle: Our team evaluates special requirements on a case-by-case basis. Tell us what you need.

services.title: Turbine maintenance
services.shortDescription: Preventive, corrective and predictive programs for hydraulic, steam and gas turbines. Inspections, major and minor overhauls.
services.heroSubtitle: Preventive, corrective and predictive maintenance programs designed to maximize availability and extend the useful life of your equipment.

includes.title: What this service includes
items: Preventive maintenance based on operating hours or calendar
Failure diagnosis and root cause analysis

services.closing: Reduce unplanned shutdowns. Let's talk about a maintenance plan for your plant.

services.title: Turbine assembly
services.shortDescription: Complete mechanical installation of turbines and auxiliary equipment, from on-site reception to final coupling.
services.heroSubtitle: Complete mechanical installation from on-site equipment reception to handover ready for commissioning.

includes.title: What this service includes
items: Pre-assembly and assembly of rotor, stator and casing
Assembly of auxiliary systems (lubrication oil, cooling, control)

applications.title: Applications
items: Simple and combined cycle gas plants
Auxiliary equipment and balance of plant systems

services.closing: Ensure installation that meets manufacturer standards. Inquire about your next project.

services.title: Commissioning
services.shortDescription: Commissioning, acceptance tests, synchronization and operational handover to the client.
services.heroSubtitle: We transform an installed unit into an operational, reliable power generation unit, formally handed over to the client.
services.closing: Move from construction to operation with technical confidence and documentation support.

services.title: Precision alignment
services.shortDescription: Precision laser alignment between turbine and generator. Reduction of vibrations and premature wear.
services.heroSubtitle: Laser alignment between turbine, gearbox and generator to eliminate vibrations, reduce wear and protect your investment.

includes.title: What this service includes
items: Correction of angular and parallel misalignments
Soft foot and base flatness verification

benefits.title: Benefits for your plant
items: Extended bearing and seal service life

services.closing: Good alignment can save years of service life. Request a one-time or scheduled service.

services.title: Technical consulting
services.shortDescription: Specialized consulting on operations, recurring failures, maintenance plans and modernization.
services.heroSubtitle: Independent consulting to support the most important technical decisions at your plant.

includes.title: What this service includes
items: Second technical opinion on third-party proposals
Support in technical negotiations with manufacturers

applications.title: Applications
items: Plants with recurring failures without identified cause

services.title: Supplies and spare parts
services.shortDescription: Original and alternative spare parts, specialized tools and logistical support for interventions.
services.heroSubtitle: Management of original and alternative spare parts, plus specialized tools for turbine interventions.

applications.title: Applications
items: Plants with obsolete or discontinued equipment
Strategic stock of critical spare parts

services.closing: Reduce downtime with the right supply chain.
